summary: Detailed implementation plan for a 2-minute YouTube Short covering the Trump-Iran crisis (April 2026). Covers 10 scenes: collapsed Islamabad peace talks, naval blockade of Strait of Hormuz, oil price spikes, Reddit/public sentiment, and ceasefire deadline. Uses the existing Remotion project architecture (AIEditorShort pattern) with ElevenLabs TTS voiceover, AI-generated scene images, kinetic typography, audio-reactive visuals, and hostile easing per the youtube-shorts-mastermind protocol. Includes documentation updates to BRD/PRD/SRS.
